classes.label: 1 km
classes.note: World record ~2:11 (men). Relative to trained runners.

classes.label: 2 km
classes.note: World record ~4:44. Relative to trained runners.

classes.label: 3 km
classes.note: World record ~7:20 (men).

classes.label: 5 km
classes.note: Based on 736,928 race results — avg finish 34:29. Top 30% break 30:00, top 10% break 27:00, top 1% sub-18:40.

classes.label: 10 km
classes.note: Top 40% of 10K finishers break 1 hour.

classes.label: 15 km
classes.note: World record ~41:05 (Kenenisa Bekele).

classes.label: Half Marathon (21.1 km)
classes.note: Median men 1:59, women 2:24. Top 10% men sub-1:47, top 1% men sub-1:18.

classes.label: Marathon (42.2 km)
classes.note: Median ~4:20–4:30. Top 25% under 3:55. Based on 107M+ race results.

classes.label: 25 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~1:11:28.

classes.label: 50 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~2:43:38.

classes.label: 100 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~6:33:11.

classes.label: 100 m
classes.note: World record 9.58s (Bolt). Relative to trained sprinters.

classes.label: 200 m
classes.note: World record 19.19s (Bolt).

classes.label: 400 m
classes.note: World record 43.03s.

classes.label: 800 m
classes.note: World record 1:40.91. Based on competition standards.

classes.label: 1500 m
classes.note: World record 3:26.00.

classes.label: Total (S+B+D / bodyweight)
classes.note: Based on 809,986 IPF competition entries. Elite 100kg male total ~680+ kg.

classes.label: Bench Press (1RM / bodyweight)
classes.note: 1.25× BW is stronger than ~65–70% of consistent gym-goers.

classes.label: Snatch (/ bodyweight)
classes.note: IWF standards. Elite male 100kg lifter snatches ~180kg (1.8× BW).

classes.label: Clean & Jerk (/ bodyweight)
classes.note: Elite male 100kg lifter C&J ~220kg (2.2× BW).

classes.label: Skills / Moves
classes.note: Planche achieved by ~2% of practitioners, front lever ~3%, muscle-up ~10–15% of gym-goers.

ranks.label: First steps — 10 pull-ups, 20 push-ups, basic dips
Top 20–40% — back lever, tuck front lever
Top 1–10% — full front lever, straddle planche
World record territory — one-arm planche / Hefesto

classes.label: Vertical Jump
classes.note: Average untrained ~35–40cm (male). NBA combine avg ~70cm. World record ~65.5cm standing.

classes.label: Grip Strength
classes.note: Average adult ~45–50 kg. World record ~192 kg. Per JAMAR dynamometer.

classes.label: VO2 Max
classes.note: Average untrained: 35–40 (men), 27–30 (women). Elite endurance: 70–85+ ml/kg/min.

classes.label: Flexibility (Sit-and-Reach)
classes.note: ACSM standards. Average adult 15–20cm.

classes.label: ATP / WTA Ranking
classes.note: ~5,000 ATP-ranked players globally. ~500 earn a living. NTRP scale used for recreational.

classes.label: ITTF / National Rating
classes.note: ~200M casual players globally, ~2,000 elite pros. ITTF rating similar to FIDE ELO.

classes.label: BWF World Ranking
classes.note: ~100,000 competitive players globally, ~500 tour-level. BWF ranking.

ranks.label: First steps — casual play, no rating

classes.label: PSA World Ranking
classes.note: ~500 PSA-ranked pros. ~50,000 semi-pro players globally.

classes.label: Handicap Index
classes.note: World average golfer ~15–20. Scratch (0) is top ~2% of registered golfers. USGA data.

classes.label: Average Score
classes.note: Average recreational bowler 130–150. PBA Tour average ~220+.

classes.label: 3-Dart Average
classes.note: PDC pros average 95–105+. Phil Taylor peak avg ~110. Max per 3 darts = 180.

classes.label: Belt Rank
classes.note: White→Blue ~2 yrs, Blue→Purple ~2–3 yrs, Purple→Brown ~3–4 yrs, Brown→Black ~1+ yr.

classes.label: ELO Rating
classes.note: Chess.com median ~500, Lichess median ~1400 (different scales). FIDE: 2200+ = FIDE Master, 2500+ = GM. Use either platform — Lichess runs ~200–300pts higher.

ranks.label: First steps — Chess.com under 800 / Lichess under 1000

classes.label: 3×3 Rubik's Cube
classes.note: World record 3.47s (single), ~4.09s official average. WCA data.

classes.label: 2000m Ergometer
classes.note: Concept2 rankings. World record ~5:35. Average club rower ~7:00–7:30.

classes.label: 100m Freestyle
classes.note: World record 46.91s (Cielo). Average club swimmer ~1:00–1:15.

classes.label: 1500m Freestyle
classes.note: World record ~14:31. Average club swimmer ~18–22 min.

classes.label: 100 km Century
classes.note: Average recreational cyclist ~4–5 hrs. Elite ~2:30.

classes.label: Sport Grade (YDS)
classes.note: From Mountain Project / gym data. 5.10 is roughly top 50% of climbers.

classes.label: Olympic Round (72 arrows)
classes.note: World record 700/720. Average club archer ~480–540.

classes.label: Ironman (3.8km/180km/42.2km)
classes.note: Avg 12–13 hours. Kona qualifying typically sub-9hrs.

classes.label: Words Per Minute (WPM)
classes.note: Average office typist 40 WPM. Touch-typist 60–80. Competitive 120+. TypeRacer / Monkeytype data.

classes.label: Codeforces Rating
classes.note: ~1M+ users. Average ~1200. Top 1% (red) ~2000+. ICPC finalist ~2400+.

classes.label: AMC / AIME / IMO
classes.note: ~300,000 AMC participants. AIME qualifiers top ~5%. IMO participants ~600 globally.

classes.label: Act Rank
classes.note: Iron ~35%, Bronze ~25%, Silver ~20%, Gold ~12%, Platinum ~5%, Diamond ~2%, Ascendant ~0.7%, Radiant ~0.03%. Riot Games data.

classes.label: Ranked Tier
classes.note: ~150M players. Iron–Bronze ~40%, Silver ~25%, Gold ~20%, Platinum ~10%, Diamond ~2%, Master+ ~0.5%. Riot Games.

classes.label: CS2 / FACEIT Rating
classes.note: CS2 Premier Rating. FACEIT ELO 500–4000. Valve / ESIC data.

ranks.label: Top 20–40% — B2, fluent in most topics

classes.label: JLPT (Japanese)
classes.note: ~1.8M test-takers annually.

classes.label: HSK (Chinese Mandarin)
classes.note: ~10M test-takers. HSK 6 = advanced fluency.

classes.label: Goethe (German)
classes.note: ~1M test-takers annually. Directly maps to CEFR.

classes.label: Tournament ROI %
classes.note: Hendon Mob / poker tracking databases. Long-run ROI from volume of live/online tournaments.
